Module 6:
Susan Garrett’s “Brilliant
Recalls” Sales Video
Breakdown
!
Executive Summary
• 	Now we are going to look at Susan Garrett’s sales video, this is for her
Brilliant Recalls course.
• 	Susan is a dog trainer. Her market is the Dog Agility training market,
although this product works for people in the general dog training
market.
• 	Susan is in a small market and her list was under 20,000 people. This
launch is one of the most successful internal launches I have ever heard
of.
!
Video Summary
• 	She opens right away with a very big promise
• 	Then she goes to social proof and authority right away (mentions 8,000
people watching the webinar series)
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 3 --

• 	0:59 - “Social proof” - “Over the last month or so, you’ll have heard a lot
about my online course the 5 Minute Formula
• 	1:52 - Future Passing: This is where you get people to imagine how their
life will change, how their life will be transformed after they go through
this training.
• 	2:58 - “Investment” - great word to use in a sales video
• 	3:20 - “With a successful coach…” - the way she says she’d love to be
your coach is great
• 	3:55 - Begins to move into the “stuff”. Would have been great to see
more focus on the transformation - what is this going to do for the dog
owner?
• 	4:58 - Tour of the product - again needs more transformation in here
• 	6:00 - Mentions an “Inner Circle” - this builds community, and it’s okay to
start now
• 	6:30 - Great part with some objection crushing
• 	7:14 - Answering more objections - watch this example
• 	8:00 - Delivers her big promise
• 	8:25 - Scarcity - this is key
• 	8:34 - Fork in the road - “will you join us in ‘do land’?”
• 	9:00 - “Hit the get it now button” - clear call to action but…
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 2 of 3 --

• 	This is where we run into an issue - Susan hasn’t even mentioned
the offer, price revelation, guarantee, bonuses, etc.
• 	9:19 - Mentions an upcoming webinar
• 	Clearly missing the price revelation and price justification
• 	Missing the bonuses, add some to increase value of offer
!
3	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 3 of 3 --
